title: SparkLayer Site Key (.spsk)
description: Public entry point manifest for a SparkLayer-enabled domain. Served at /.well-known/spark.spsk. Contains publisher identity, public keys, and pointers to .spk/.spki resources.

@context.description: JSON-LD context for this document type.

@id.description: Globally unique identifier for this site. Format: spark:site:<domain>

name.description: Human-readable name of the publisher or site.

spark_protocol_version.description: Version of the SparkLayer protocol this site implements.

url.description: URL of publisher's About page or homepage.

public_keys.description: Publisher's public keys for signature verification. Multiple keys allow key rotation without downtime.

type.description: Key algorithm type. Ed25519 strongly preferred for performance.

expires.description: Optional key expiry. Agents should reject signatures from expired keys.

default_depth_spark.description: Maximum depth level accessible without authentication. 0 = HTML-only (no direct .spk access). 1 = public structured content.

max_depth_spark.description: Maximum depth level available on this site (with full access).

entry_points.description: Named pointers to .spk indexes and .spki action interfaces.

url.description: URL of the resource. Use enc:// scheme for vault-protected resources, https:// for public.

compliance_required.description: Minimum compliance level required to receive legitimate content. Below this level, agents receive Abysse Data (honeypot).

honeypot_enabled.description: Whether Abysse Data (honeypot) is active for non-compliant crawlers.

vault_endpoint.description: Base URL of the vault server for depth-gated content access.

token_bank_endpoint.description: Token Bank endpoint for payment settlement. Defaults to SparkLayer hosted bank.

deployment_mode.description: open = full security stack (public web). lite = relaxed security (trusted network / intranet).

supported_usage.description: AI usage types this publisher permits across their content (can be overridden per .spk depth level).

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last modification. Agents use this for cache invalidation.

ttl.description: Cache TTL in seconds. Agents should re-fetch .spsk after this period.
